candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line, not nested under the selected COGS rows, and explicitly tied to vessels, which aligns with cost-of-sales/vessel operations.

Separate operating D&A line at the same level as other operating expenses; for a shipping company this likely relates largely to leased vessels/operating assets rather than admin overhead, so it appears outside the selected COGS rows and suitable to add separately.
Looks like a summary depreciation row in some periods, but overlaps with more specific component rows, so using it would risk double counting.
Appears to be a special component within depreciation rather than a clean standalone COGS D&A bucket; adding it separately would be uncertain and may double count with summary depreciation.
More consistent with admin/corporate assets than direct vessel operating costs.
More consistent with overhead/admin than direct COGS.

variables.notes: Selected only separate operating D&A rows that appear outside the already selected COGS bucket ('Vessel operating costs' and 'Costs'). Excluded generic summary rows to avoid overlap with components. Manual review because 'Depreciation of Right-of-use assets' is likely but not explicitly labelled as vessel/COGS-related.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line outside the selected SG&A row and most naturally associated with administrative/corporate assets.
Separate operating amortisation line outside the selected SG&A row and most naturally associated with overhead/admin rather than vessel operating costs.
Appears to be a summary depreciation row in some periods, but overlaps with specific component rows and is not clearly SG&A-only.
Unclear special component within depreciation; not clearly attributable to SG&A and could overlap a summary row.
More likely tied to operating leased assets/vessels than admin overhead in this shipping context.
Explicitly vessel-related and therefore more consistent with COGS than SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected only separate operating D&A rows that appear outside the selected XSGA bucket ('Overhead and administration expenses') and are most consistent with admin/overhead assets. Excluded vessel/ROU depreciation as more likely COGS-related, and excluded summary depreciation rows to avoid double counting with components.
